description_long: This is a pair of open-toe slip-on slippers with a natural woven texture, likely made from straw or a similar material. The slippers feature a wide upper band adorned with decorative pink and red fruit-shaped embellishments, possibly representing apples or cherries, and a small green leaf detail. The footbed is flat and rectangular, bordered by a white trim that runs along the edge of the sole and upper. The overall design is casual and lightweight, suitable for indoor or light outdoor use in urban environments. The slippers appear to be soft and comfortable, with a flexible structure and no visible fastenings or laces. The condition is clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A pair of natural woven slip-on slippers with pink and red fruit decorations and white trim, featuring a flat, rectangular footbed and open toe design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open toe, wide upper band with fruit decorations, and the rectangular footbed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat sole, woven texture, and the profile of the fruit embellishments on the upper band.
description_view_2: Direct front view focusing on the symmetrical placement of the fruit decorations and the open entry for the foot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other slipper's profile, the woven material, and the decorative details.
